bug.description: type confusion where a pointer is cast to an incompatible struct type

prompt:
There is a type confusion where a pointer is cast to an incompatible struct type downstream of function nr_pdcp_ue_add_srb_pdcp_entity in the openair2/LAYER2/nr_pdcp subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/nr_pdcp/nr_pdcp_ue_manager.c:160.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
